title: ocimum masaiense
intro: Ocimum masaiense is a species of plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to East Africa. This herb is known for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ocimum masaiense include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve respiratory health, and alleviate symptoms of fever and cough. In traditional African medicine, Ocimum masaiense is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as decoctions and infusions.
